summary_en: SMS Data Tech to acquire all 200 shares of CheckField Corporation for complete subsidiary status. Purchase price not disclosed. Funding from internal cash reserves. CheckField specializes in IT systems consulting and outsourcing (helpdesk, server operations, equipment setup). Effective 29 May 2026.
title_en: Notice regarding the acquisition of all shares of CheckField Corporation (establishment as wholly owned subsidiary)
translation_en_brief: SMS Data Tech Corporation has decided to acquire all shares (200 shares, representing 100% ownership) of CheckField Corporation, a Tokyo-based IT consulting and outsourcing services firm, to establish it as a wholly owned subsidiary effective 29 May 2026. The acquisition will be executed through a share transfer agreement with the two individual shareholders (Junpei Meshiro holding 65%, and Gen Yamashita holding 35%), with payment in cash sourced entirely from SMS Data Tech's internal reserves. The purchase price has not been disclosed in the filing. CheckField specializes in consulting, systems planning, and outsourcing services related to telecommunications, information systems, and office automation, with stated expertise in helpdesk support, server operations, and equipment configuration. SMS Data Tech stated the acquisition rationale as enabling business expansion and enhanced group-level competitiveness through integration of technical capabilities, know-how, and customer bases; the complete subsidiary structure will support unified management direction and faster decision-making.
